positive: A whimsical, highly detailed illustration of a bioluminescent forest at night. Giant glowing mushrooms, crystalline flora, and gentle, ethereal sprites flitting between the trees. Style: Studio Ghibli meets psychedelic watercolor, vibrant colors, volumetric lighting, fantasy concept art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, monochrome, harsh shadows, jpeg artifacts
